name: Brown Sugar Scones
recipeIngredient: 1 cup golden yellow brown sugar (not dark brown)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, baking powder, and sugar.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture is like coarse meal. Mix the raisins evenly through the dry ingredients.
3. Add the milk and stir until a sticky dough forms.
4. Divide the dough into 3 equal portions. With floured hands and on a floured surface, pat each portion into a circle about 3/4 to 1 inch thick.
5. Using a sharp knife, cut each dough circle into 6 wedges. Place them on ungreased baking sheets.
6. Bake at 375°F until golden brown and a toothpick inserted in the center of one comes out clean.
Note: Sometimes a little more or less milk may be needed, likely due to the moisture content of the flour. Leave space between the scones as they tend to spread while baking.
